urgencyScale.label: Future
urgencyScale.definition: Need-by date is more than 30 calendar days away.

urgencyScale.label: Upcoming
urgencyScale.definition: Need-by date is 15–30 calendar days away.

urgencyScale.label: Near-term
urgencyScale.definition: Need-by date is 8–14 calendar days away.

urgencyScale.label: Immediate
urgencyScale.definition: Need-by date is 1–7 calendar days away, or linked work is in the active lookahead window.

urgencyScale.label: Overdue / blocking now
urgencyScale.definition: Need-by date has passed, linked work is current-week work, or float is zero/negative.

scoreBands.requiredPosture: Owner, mitigation, due date, review cadence, and PX visibility required.
Immediate escalation, PX review, executive visibility, response plan, and Priority Action candidate required.

severityOverrides.condition: overdue and linked to current-week work
constraint already converted to delay or change event
severityOverrides.minimumBand: High until linked item is closed
